title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Collective Negotiated Agreement (CNA) with the Association of Municipal Employees of Los Baños, Laguna (AMELBA-UNA), Inc., the Organized and Existing Employee?s Association of the Municipal Government and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR JONATHAN BRYAN S. SIYTIAP, 12/05/2022)
